title: Create: Linear Bearing
description: This mod adds a working linear bearing for Create Aeronautics.
body:
# Create: Linear Bearing — True Physics-Based Sliders!

Hey everyone! If you are playing with Create Aeronautics, you already know how awesome it is to build moving vehicles and airships. But there was always one missing piece: a reliable way to make stable, physics-based linear sliders, cranes, and elevators that hook directly into the world physics.

Create: Linear Bearing solves this perfectly for NeoForge 1.21.1. It allows you to transform any glued block structure into a fully physics-driven sliding mechanism using the power of the Sable engine!

## What does this mod do?

**Blocks:**

 - Linear Bearing  ![Linear bearing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08bf5f0ed70da37b6a2be1094fe8f4a48ce9017e_0.webp)
 
    A linear bearing is something like an swivel bearing from Aeronautics, when pressed, it gathers the structure above it and transforms itself into a sliding structure on the casing.

 - Linear Casing  ![Linear casing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b22809aa924e0a30f48d50cfd0e01362b63549ac_0.webp)
  
    Well, it's just a case for linear bearings.

![Linear bearing and casing gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caed96091e030841c212961173eb00ef79da235f.gif)

 - Torsional Anchor  ![Torsional anchor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abd92cb1a9dfd60ebfc4c1c475b2b36b4941854e_0.webp)
  
    A torsional anchor is a block with a cogwheel that transmits rotation through springs. You just put it on and put a spring on its "head" and the other end of the spring on the other anchor and they both rotate.

![Torsional anchor gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9834401bc621a2ac352bcfd0ab670c041f3b8e31.gif)

 - Magnetic Port  ![Magnetic port](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55e2b4d43b037adb34a98e11117307a526fa9b2e.png)
  
    A magnetic port is a device that transmits rotation over a distance, and it works the same way in Sable physical structures.

![magnetic port gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a62cce3b08e03f6f02fbada9b49f7382d9ecff.gif)

 - Andesite Lamp  ![Andesite lamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e5c7565e4ff05c95894d4a2e5f2cbd2e9d464f.png)
  
    The andesite lamp shines depending on the strength of the redstone signal

![lamp gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fd2c58fa37320214db4a3022a67298e2c179fef.gif)

 - Redstone Converter  ![Redstone converter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3a942a94132c4c87544c0b6cf34dd888158a913.png)
  
    The redstone converter converts the rotation speed to redstone, more specifically, one redstone signal level is added every 8 RPM.

![Converter gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbd6662f0c02bb1ab054ef8cf1a0edbec1ecf31d.gif)

 - Gyroscopic Gearbox  ![Gyroscopic gearbox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b71b309c6180ef231ef3fc7af7adb2ea5052f134.png)

    The gyroscopic gearbox aligns the mechanisms connected to it by rotating in opposition to the rotation of the Sable sub-level on which it is located.

![Gearbox gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa77b81762f4fdaf219d77e9636892ea5e56ce25.gif)

 - Slippery Copycat  ![Slippery Copycat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e83f8af69adc89c66935fbb469302a4270aa7211.png)

    It's just a slippery copycat.

![Slippery Copycat gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/381e9816523415545c48dd0a79b3f4e86a34c165.gif)

 - Bubble Gum Block  ![Bubble Gum block gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/921ec98cb37eeecc5b11e9cee4a157c22ca38fcd.png)

    This block is quite sticky.

## Required mod

 1. Create
 2. Create Aeronautics
 3. Sable


#
### Special thanks to DiamondMan10570, Yarik265
